title: Realistic Vanilla Horses
description: More horse colours that are both realistic and vanilla friendly (+Fresh Animations)
body:
Adds several more horse colours + patterns that are both more realistic (no more black mould or uniform white spots) and vanilla friendly (all are based on the vanilla texture).

### Colours
- Black
- Brown
- Dark Bay
- Cherry Bay
- Liver Chestnut (+ flaxen mane/tail)
- Sorrel (+ flaxen mane/tail)
- Palomino
- Buckskin
- Dark Gray
- Steel Gray
- Gray
- Cremello ("White")

### Patterns
- Face Markings (Star, Snip, Blaze, Stripe)
- Leg Markings (Socks, Stockings)
- Combinations of Face and Leg markings (e.g. Star with Socks)
- Dapples
- Roan
- Dorsal Stripe
- Paint (5 options including Overo, Tobiano and Splash)
- Appaloosa (Leopard, Blanket, Spotted Blanket and Snowflake)

### To-Do
- More paint/appaloosa options so it is less likely that 2 horses look the same
- Adjust rarities of each type of colour/marking to be more realistic
